title.en: But now, Ye Tian has done it!

content.en:
The Lord of the Black Ape is the perfect controller of the True Realm, although it is just an ordinary perfect controller of the True Realm, but he is also a strong man who has been famous for countless years.

As for Ye Tian, it is not very long to become the perfect controller of the virtual realm, but now he has hit the master of the black ape, this is not a little stronger than the master of the black ape, but much stronger, and the strength has completely crushed the perfect controller of the real realm!

At this moment, the Lord of Tianhe couldn't use any words to describe Ye Tian's strength, he could only say that Ye Tian was too rebellious.

Under normal circumstances, a Reality Perfect Master can easily smash the top Realm Perfect Controller, and a powerful Reality Perfect Master can even wipe out a group of Reality Perfect Controllers with a wave of his hand.

The three realms of the virtual realm, the true realm, and the extreme realm, each gap is a realm, and the strength span is very large, and it is almost impossible to fight beyond the level.

But now, Ye Tian has done it!

"Lord of the Heavenly River, I just defeated the Lord of the Black Ape by luck. Ye Tian said modestly.

The Lord of the Heavenly River knew that Ye Tian was being humble, and immediately said, "Lord of Endless, thank you for helping me, otherwise I wouldn't be able to take down this incomplete Extreme Dao Treasure." "

"It's just a trivial matter, I'll leave first, if it's delayed, the treasures will be taken away by others!"

Ye Tian said.

"Hmm!"

The Lord of the Heavenly River nodded, and immediately left the place to continue the search for the treasure.

......

"There's a complete dragon hall here!"

Ye Tian came to a huge dragon hall, which was covered by a magic circle.

He tried to attack, only to shake the dragon hall, but it didn't tear the circle apart.

"It can't be opened, no wonder there is no one here, it seems that even the top True Realm Perfect Controller can't break this magic circle!" Ye Tian guessed.

Maybe this magic circle is not as good as the one of this space-time fragment, but it doesn't have the strength of the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and it can't be opened by brute force, it won't work at all.

Unless you parse this circle, you can open it.

However, it takes a long time to parse a circle.

"We have to think of something else!"

Ye Tian kept analyzing various methods in his mind, and soon thought of a solution.

"Primordial Black Sea!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This magic circle did not contain the extreme rules of the extreme realm, so he could enter the Primordial Black Sea first, and then calculate the location accurately, and come out of the Primordial Black Sea, and the location that came out was the inside of this Dragon Palace.

"This method works, whether it is the end of the realm or the extreme deep sea, any location can be connected to the Primordial Black Sea, so this place can also be connected to the Primordial Black Sea. The Demon Dragon Tower doesn't have the strength to shield the Primordial Black Sea, so let's use this method!"

Ye Tian carefully calculated the location, and only then did he cross over to the Primordial Black Sea in one step.

Then, Ye Tian's body moved slightly in the Primordial Black Sea, and then returned to the fragments of time and space.

After coming back, Ye Tian found that he was already inside the Dragon Palace.

"Sure enough, it worked!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Of course, this method can only be used by him, and others can't use it at all, after all, no one else can enter the Primordial Black Sea!

Interior of the Dragon Palace.

Ye Tian saw a lot of good things and collected them one by one.

This dragon hall was supposed to be the palace of a big man in the Demon Dragon Tower, but that big man fell in the war, so this dragon hall became an ownerless thing.

Many Extreme Path creatures don't like to keep all their treasures on their bodies, such as keeping most of their cultivation resources in their lair, and the same is true for this Demon Dragon Tower powerhouse.

Soon, Ye Tian found a lot of resources, all of which had a good effect on him.

"Hey, there are even three Extreme Dao Monuments!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

Defense Pole Dao Monument, Force Pole Monument and Wind Pole Monument, the value of these three Pole Dao Monuments can be imagined how high it is, if it is dedicated to the Wudao Tower, it is enough for the Wudao Tower to cultivate many strong people.

"It seems that the owner of this Dragon Hall should be a Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm!"

Ye Tian can be sure.

However, he didn't see the Extreme Treasure.

Obviously, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller had all the Extreme Realm Treasures with him, and it was impossible for him to stay in the Dragon Palace.

And these resources alone are enough to make Ye Tian have a bumper harvest.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the cultivation time and space of the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm in the Dragon Palace, and the formation here was simpler.

After Ye Tian took a little time to open it, he walked into this cultivation time and space and saw a special treasure.

"What kind of treasure is this?"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

It was a black piece of iron, more like a fragment on a set of battle armor, but this fragment contained the breath of the Extreme Defense Pole, and it obviously contained the power of the Extreme Defense Pole, and the power contained was not less.

This fragment was suspended in the void, bound by a small magic circle, and through this magic circle, one could perceive the extreme defense pole contained in this fragment.

"That Extreme Realm Perfect Controller is using this fragment to comprehend the Extreme Defense Extreme Path!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, the other party should not have really comprehended the Defensive Extreme Dao to the extreme realm, otherwise he would not have stayed in this magic circle.

Soon, Ye Tian destroyed this magic circle and took this fragment.

"Great harvest, with such a fragment, even if the extreme defense extreme power contained in this fragment is exhausted in the future, I can continue to copy this fragment and continue to comprehend, it seems that it will not be difficult to comprehend the defense limit of the extreme realm in the future!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

For him, the value of this fragment has surpassed the three Extreme Dao Monuments.

Subsequently, Ye Tian scraped this dragon hall over and over again, and after making sure that there were no treasures, he left the dragon hall.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian found a lot of places in this space-time fragment, but the harvest did not exceed that of the Dragon Palace.

Although the space-time fragments were large, the speed of these cultivators who came in was fast, so it didn't take long for the resources here to be scraped away.

Thankfully, there is no danger here.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian decided.

Soon, he was emerging from the fragments of space.

After returning to the Wudao Tower, Ye Tian contributed some of the resources he had harvested to the Wudao Tower, and also contributed the defense of the Extreme Dao Monument to the Wudao Tower.

After all, this opportunity was given by the Wudao Tower, and Ye Tian had to give some benefits to the Wudao Tower to cultivate the descendants of the Wudao Tower.

If they, the tower masters, get the benefits and don't take them out, how can they have the resources to cultivate those cultivators of the Daoless Pagoda!

And when Ye Tian took out so many resources and a defensive Extreme Dao Monument, the Lord of the Daoless and the Lord of the Canggu were all shocked.

"Lord of Infinity, you've got so many goodies!!"

The Lord of the Pathless Path is inconceivable.

He originally thought that Ye Tian might not be able to obtain many good things when he entered that space-time fragment as the perfect controller of the Void Realm, but he never expected that Ye Tian would get too many things.

If all cultivators had such a harvest, it would be understandable, but it seems that only Ye Tian has gained a little too much!

"Good luck!"

Ye Tian said.

The Lord of the Daoless Dao did not bother with Ye Tian's harvest, they only felt that Ye Tian was generous and contributed so many resources.

If he knew that Ye Tian had obtained something better, and that he also had three Extreme Dao Tablets, but only contributed one Extreme Dao Tablet, he would have to roll his eyes.

But now, the Wudao Tower also has two Extreme Dao Monuments, and they are both contributed by Ye Tian.

With these two Extreme Dao Monuments, the perfect controllers of the Daoless Tower will be blessed, and it will be easy for them to become super perfect controllers in the future.
